description: Missing authorization checks on DELETE /v1/users/{id} allow privilege escalation.
Password reset token not invalidated after use; account takeover possible.
Directory listing enabled on /static/ exposing internal build artifacts.
AES encryption uses ECB mode for card tokens; pattern leakage detected.
Unparameterized SQL in report filter allows UNION-based injection.
Login failure events are not recorded with source IP or correlation ID.
Dependency xyz 1.2.3 includes a known RCE; patch available in 1.2.8.
Admin-only endpoints accessible to users with 'support' role via API.
Unvalidated URL fetcher allows internal metadata endpoint access.
Kubernetes dashboard exposed without auth on internal network.
Unsigned plugin packages loaded at runtime from S3 bucket.
No rate limiting planned for login endpoints in design spec.
Template engine evaluates untrusted expressions in email templates.
MFA bypass possible via legacy endpoint not covered by policy.
Role-based UI hides controls but backend enforces only on some routes.
